content.text:
```mdl
@ AGREEMENT ON THE NON‑DISCLOSURE OF CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION (TWO‑WAY)
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_15_nda_1

open std.strings

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Domain types
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 2 – “The parties will mark or otherwise designate confidential
  information to show expressly or by necessary implication that it is
  imparted in confidence.”
type ConfidentialInformation = {
    description : string,   -- free‑form description of the material
    is_marked   : bool      -- true iff the material has been marked
                         -- as “Confidential” (or equivalent)
}

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Entities (public model objects)
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 2 – the material that is to be protected
entity confidential_information : ConfidentialInformation

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Rules (deontic requirements)
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 2 – the disclosing party must expressly identify every piece of
  confidential information.
rule O confidential_information_must_be_marked:
    confidential_information.is_marked always

-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Hypothesis check (optional, for traceability)
-- ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Hypothesis: All Confidential Information shall be expressly identified by the
  Disclosing Party.
rule O hypothesis_all_confidential_info_marked:
    confidential_information.is_marked always
```
